title: Junior Landscape Architectural Technologist
description:
Help shape projects from first sketch to final site walk. ISL’s Landscape Architecture and Urban Design (LAUD) studio in Calgary is looking for a Junior Landscape Architectural Technologist who is eager to grow in a studio environment, strengthen technical skills, and contribute to projects that become real places in our communities.

title: Intern Architect
description:
**CYNC Architecture Inc. – Calgary** 




**CYNC Architecture is a small Calgary\-based studio working on civic, cultural, and community\-focused projects across Western and Northern Canada.** 




**We are looking for an Architectural Intern** 
 who is curious, thoughtful, and interested in contributing to meaningful architecture. In our small studio environment, you will work closely with senior architects and be involved in projects from early ideas through construction.
